Fendi · early 2000s

The Floral Appliqué Baguette

Satin body with hand-appliquéd calf-hair flowers and beaded detailing, finished with the iconic FF buckle. A true collector's Baguette from Fendi's most sought-after era — and, like everything here, the only one we'll ever have.

ConditionVery good
MaterialSatin · calf hair

Our story

During Covid we just wanted to sell our own bags — DesignDrobe was born.

What began with a few pieces from our personal wardrobe has grown into a trusted home for pre-loved luxury in the UAE. Every bag is inspected, authenticated and re-photographed by us before it finds its next owner.

500+Bags homed
100%Authenticated

Questions,
answered.

Still unsure about something? Message us on WhatsApp — we usually reply within the hour.

Yes. Every bag is authenticated in-house before it's listed. We inspect hardware, stitching, date codes and materials, and each order ships with our authenticity guarantee.

These are pre-loved pieces, so most show gentle signs of a past life. We grade every bag honestly — Excellent, Very good, or Good — and photograph it exactly as found so there are no surprises.

We deliver to all seven emirates. Orders over Dhs 1,000 ship free; smaller orders have a flat delivery fee shown at checkout. Most orders arrive within 2–4 working days.

Absolutely — consignment is at the heart of what we do. Send us photos of your bag, we'll authenticate and value it, then handle the styling, listing and sale for you. You're paid once it finds a new home.

Because we only ever have a single piece of each item, we can't hold bags. When a piece is gone, it's gone — so if something catches your eye, it's worth acting on it.

If a bag arrives not as described, contact us within 3 days and we'll make it right. As each piece is unique and pre-loved, we review returns case by case rather than offering blanket exchanges.

Join the list — first to see
new arrivals.

One quiet email a week. New pieces, restocks and the occasional archive drop. No spam, ever.
